title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners:
Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners!
